entries.title: Ranger
entries.description: Rangers are hunters, scouts, explorers, and survivalists trained to move through hostile wilderness. This is a clean test class page used to verify the public compendium system.
entries.content:

type: Class
item_class: Common
visibility: public
tags: [Class, Test]

# Ranger

Rangers are hunters, scouts, explorers, and survivalists trained to move through hostile wilderness.

## Role

- Exploration
- Ranged combat
- Tracking
- Survival

## Test Note

This is a clean test class page used to verify the public compendium system.

entries.title: Iron Ingot
entries.description: A refined bar of iron produced from smelted iron ore. Iron Ingots are common crafting materials for basic weapons, armour, tools, and structures. Used in simple and advanced metalworking projects.
entries.content:
---
type: Ingot
item_class: Common
material_type: Metal
visibility: public
tags: [Item, Material, Ingot, Metal, Test]
market_value: 16 Marks
---

# Iron Ingot

A refined bar of iron produced from smelted iron ore.

## Effect

Iron Ingots are common crafting materials for basic weapons, armour, tools, and structures.

## Crafting Use

Used in simple and advanced metalworking projects.

entries.title: Iron Ore
entries.description: A common iron-bearing ore used as the foundation for basic smithing and metalworking. Iron Ore can be refined into Iron Ingots using a standard forge. Used for weapons, armour, tools, fittings, and simple metal goods.
entries.content:
---
type: Ore
item_class: Common
material_type: Metal
visibility: public
tags: [Item, Material, Ore, Metal, Test]
market_value: 4 Marks
---

# Iron Ore

A common iron-bearing ore used as the foundation for basic smithing and metalworking.

## Effect

Iron Ore can be refined into Iron Ingots using a standard forge.

## Crafting Use

Used for weapons, armour, tools, fittings, and simple metal goods.

# Longsword

A standard one-handed blade used by soldiers, guards, adventurers, and trained duelists.

## Weapon Data

- Base Material: Metal
- Ingot Requirement: 3 Ingots

entries.title: Undien
entries.description: The Undien are water-touched people adapted to rivers, coasts, deep lakes, and ancient drowned ruins. Undien are available as a playable race. They are best suited to campaigns with rivers, coastlines, drowned ruins, spirit-touche
entries.content:

raceCategory: Humanoid
playable: true
size: Medium

  - Spirit
visibility: public
tags:

  - aquatic
  - riverfolk
  - water-touched
---

# Undien

The Undien are water-touched people adapted to rivers, coasts, deep lakes, and ancient drowned ruins.

## Traits

- Amphibious affinity
- Water movement familiarity
- Strong connection to aquatic cultures

## Racial Skills

- River Navigation
- Breath Control
- Drowned Ruin Lore

## Character Creation Notes

Undien are available as a playable race. They are best suited to campaigns with rivers, coastlines, drowned ruins, spirit-touched waters, or maritime cultures.

## Test Note

This is a clean test race page used to verify the public compendium system.
